name: Kenya Payroll Addon
author: Xetuu
description: Statutory payroll computation for Kenya — PAYE (graduated bands), NSSF Tier I & II, SHIF (2.75%) and the Affordable Housing Levy (1.5%). Adds the P9A, P10, NSSF, SHA and Housing Levy statutory reports, and relabels company fields to KRA PIN / NSSF / SHA.
